items.content: Much is new about this month’s upcoming FIFA World Cup tournament, which will be held in the US, Canada, and Mexico. It hosts more teams than ever before. RBI offers concessional swaps, allows leverage for NRI deposits to drive forex inflows
items.content: The Reserve Bank of India has introduced new foreign exchange measures. These include special swap facilities to encourage state-owned companies to raise funds abroad. Banks can now offer leverage on foreign currency non-resident deposits. These initiatives aim to boost overseas fundraising and deposit mobilization for Indian entities.

items.title: Zepto IPO: Aadit Palicha, Kaivalya Vohra to hold stake; Nexus Ventures biggest seller in OFS
items.content: Quick commerce firm Zepto's promoters will not dilute equity in its upcoming IPO, which aims to raise Rs 8,010 crore via fresh issue and an offer for sale (OFS) of up to Rs 11,000 crore. Early investors are set to offload over 11.35 crore shares, with Nexus Ventures being the largest seller.

Planet nine mystery deepens as new discovery challenges hidden planet theory
items.content: Astronomers have spent years searching for a possible hidden giant planet far beyond Neptune. Unusual orbits among distant Kuiper Belt objects have fueled the Planet Nine theory, but recent discoveries are challenging the idea by showing more stable motion than expected. If Planet Nine exists, it may be much farther away than originally thought.

items.title: NASA updates worsening ISS leak after crew safety alert
items.content: NASA says a long-running air leak aboard the ISS recently worsened, leading engineers to investigate new suspected crack locations and consider a riskier repair strategy. Astronauts were temporarily moved into a safe haven as a precaution before the repair was postponed for further analysis.
